member.name: T:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.Authorization.IAuthMetrics
member.summary: Standard interface for recording authorization-related business metrics.

member.name: M:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.Authorization.IAuthMetrics.RecordSuccess(System.String)
member.summary: Records a successful authorization check.

member.name: M:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.Authorization.IAuthMetrics.RecordFailure(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Records a failed authorization check.

member.name: T:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.Authorization.RequirePermissionAttribute
member.summary: Declarative permission-based authorization for controller actions. Supports both global and resource-scoped permissions.

member.name: T:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.Database.SnakeCaseNamingHelper
member.summary: Helper to apply snake_case naming convention to all database entities. This follows PostgreSQL naming conventions.

member.name: M:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.Database.SnakeCaseNamingHelper.ApplySnakeCaseNaming(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.ModelBuilder)
member.summary: Applies snake_case naming convention to all entity types in the model. Call this from your DbContext's OnModelCreating method.

member.name: M:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.Database.SnakeCaseNamingHelper.ToSnakeCase(System.String)
member.summary: Converts a string to snake_case following these rules: - PascalCase -> pascal_case - camelCase -> camel_case - Handles acronyms: HTTPSConnection -> https_connection
member.returns: The snake_case version of the input

member.name: T:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.IAMExtensions
member.summary: Extensions for IAM client configuration.

member.name: M:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.IAMExtensions.AddIAMClient(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.String)
member.summary: Adds and configures a resilient IAM client.

member.name: M:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.IAMExtensions.AddPermissionAuthorization(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Adds permission-based authorization infrastructure.

member.name: T:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.IAM.BackgroundIAMRegistrationService
member.summary: Background service that handles IAM registration with automatic retry. Runs AFTER service startup completes, preventing blocking.

member.name: T:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.IAM.IAMRegistrationStatusTracker
member.summary: Tracks IAM registration status for health check reporting

member.name: T:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.IAM.RegistrationStatus
member.summary: IAM registration status enum

member.name: T:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.IAM.IAMRegistrationHealthCheck
member.summary: Health check that reports IAM registration status

member.name: T:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.IAM.IAMRegistrationService
member.summary: Base class for services to register permissions and roles with IAM. Registration is called by BackgroundIAMRegistrationService after service startup.

member.name: M:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.IAM.IAMRegistrationService.#ctor(System.Net.Http.IHttpClientFactory,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.IAM.IAMRegistrationService.RegisterAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Registers permissions and roles with the IAM service. Called by BackgroundIAMRegistrationService with retry logic.

member.name: T:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.IAM.IamServiceClient
member.summary: Default implementation of IAM service client for permission checking and resolution. Supports both global and resource-scoped permission checks with automatic failover.

member.name: M:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.IAM.IamServiceClient.#ctor(System.Net.Http.IHttpClientFactory,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.IAM.IamServiceClient})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The HTTP client factory configured with "IAMService" named client.

member.name: M:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.IAM.IamServiceClient.Log.FailedToFetchPermissions(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.Net.HttpStatusCode)
member.summary: Logs "Failed to fetch permissions for user {UserId}. Status: {StatusCode}" at "Warning" level.

member.name: M:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.IAM.IamServiceClient.Log.ErrorFetchingPermissions(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Logs "Error occurred while fetching permissions for user {UserId}" at "Error" level.

member.name: M:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.IAM.IamServiceClient.Log.FailedToCheckPermission(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Net.HttpStatusCode)
member.summary: Logs "Failed to check permission {Permission} for principal {PrincipalId} on resource {ResourcePath}. Status: {StatusCode}" at "Warning" level.

member.name: M:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.IAM.IamServiceClient.Log.ErrorCheckingPermission(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Logs "Error occurred while checking permission {Permission} for principal {PrincipalId} on resource {ResourcePath}" at "Error" level.

member.name: M:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.IAM.IamServiceClient.Log.ErrorBulkCheckingPermissions(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.Int32,System.Exception)
member.summary: Logs "Error occurred while bulk checking {Count} permissions for principal {PrincipalId}" at "Error" level.

member.name: T:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.IAM.IIamServiceClient
member.summary: Client interface for interacting with the central IAM service. Supports both global and resource-scoped permission checking with caching.

member.name: M:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.IAM.IIamServiceClient.GetUserPermissionsAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all active permissions for a user (global permissions only). Results are cached in the IAM service with 5-minute TTL.

member.name: M:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.IAM.IIamServiceClient.CheckPermissionAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Checks if a principal has a specific permission, optionally scoped to a resource path. This is the primary method for resource-scoped authorization checks. Target latency: <10ms (cached), <50ms (uncached).
member.param: The principal ID (user or service account).
member.returns: True if the principal has the permission (globally or on the specified resource).

member.name: M:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.IAM.IIamServiceClient.CheckPermissionsAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.IAM.PermissionCheckRequest},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Checks multiple permissions in a single call for better performance. Useful for complex authorization scenarios requiring multiple permission checks.
member.param: List of permission checks to perform.
member.returns: Dictionary mapping permission IDs to boolean results.

member.name: T:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.IAM.PermissionCheckRequest
member.summary: Request for a single permission check (used in bulk checks).

member.name: P:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.IAM.PermissionCheckRequest.PermissionId
member.summary: The permission ID to check.

member.name: P:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.IAM.PermissionCheckRequest.ResourcePath
member.summary: Optional resource path for scoped checking.

member.name: T:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.IAM.IServicePermissions
member.summary: Interface for service-specific permission definitions

member.name: P:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.IAM.IServicePermissions.All
member.summary: Gets all permissions defined by the service

member.name: T:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.IAM.PermissionRegistration
member.summary: Represents a permission for IAM registration. Matches the PermissionDto expected by IAM service.

member.name: P:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.IAM.PermissionRegistration.PermissionId
member.summary: Unique permission identifier in GCP format (e.g., "accounting.journal-entries.create")

member.name: P:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.IAM.PermissionRegistration.Description
member.summary: Human-readable description of what this permission allows

member.name: T:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.IAM.RoleRegistration
member.summary: Represents a role for IAM registration. Matches the RoleDto expected by IAM service.

member.name: P:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.IAM.RoleRegistration.RoleId
member.summary: Unique role identifier in GCP format (e.g., "roles.accounting.admin")

member.name: P:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.IAM.RoleRegistration.Description
member.summary: Human-readable description of what this role provides

member.name: P:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.IAM.RoleRegistration.PermissionIds
member.summary: List of permission IDs granted by this role

member.name: P:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.IAM.RoleRegistration.IsCustom
member.summary: Whether this is a custom role (default: false for predefined roles)

member.name: M:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.Testing.IAMTestHelpers.CreateTestJWT(System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Creates a test JWT with specified permissions

member.name: M:Maliev.Aspire.ServiceDefaults.Testing.IAMTestHelpers.WithTestAuth(System.Net.Http.HttpClient,System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Adds authentication with test JWT to HttpClient

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.ApiDocumentationExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for configuring API documentation (OpenAPI + Scalar) in the application.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.ApiVersioningExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for configuring API versioning in the application.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.ApiVersioningExtensions.AddDefaultApiVersioning(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: Adds default API versioning configuration with URL segment versioning. Configures v1.0 as default, assumes default version when unspecified, reports API versions in response headers, and uses URL segment reader.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.AuthenticationExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for configuring JWT authentication in the application.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.AuthenticationExtensions.AddJwtAuthentication(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder,System.Action{Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authentication.JwtBearer.JwtBearerOptions})
member.summary: Adds JWT Bearer authentication with RSA public key validation. Reads configuration from: - Jwt:PublicKey (Base64-encoded RSA public key in PEM format) - Jwt:Issuer - Jwt:Audience
member.param: Optional action to configure JWT bearer options.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.AuthenticationExtensions.AddJwtAuthenticationSymmetric(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder,System.Action{Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authentication.JwtBearer.JwtBearerOptions})
member.summary: Adds JWT Bearer authentication with symmetric key (HMAC-SHA256) validation. Reads configuration from: - Jwt:SecurityKey (secret key) - Jwt:Issuer - Jwt:Audience
member.param: Optional action to configure JWT bearer options.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.CorsExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for configuring CORS policies in the application.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.CorsExtensions.AddDefaultCors(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder,System.String)
member.summary: Adds CORS with default policy reading from configuration. Reads allowed origins from "CORS:AllowedOrigins" configuration (comma-separated). Falls back to localhost:3000 if not configured.
member.param: Optional custom policy name (defaults to default policy).

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.CorsExtensions.AddCorsWithOptions(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder,System.Action{Microsoft.AspNetCore.Cors.Infrastructure.CorsOptions})
member.summary: Adds CORS with custom configuration.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.Extensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for configuring service defaults in a distributed application. This class includes methods for setting up OpenTelemetry, health checks, service discovery, and resilience.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.Extensions.AddServiceDefaults(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: Adds default service configurations to the application builder. This includes setting up OpenTelemetry for logging, metrics, and tracing, configuring health checks for the application and its dependencies, and enabling service discovery and resilience for HTTP clients.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.Extensions.AddServiceMeters(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder,System.String[])
member.summary: Adds service-specific meters to OpenTelemetry metrics collection. Call this AFTER AddServiceDefaults() to register custom business metrics meters.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.Extensions.MapDefaultEndpoints(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.WebApplication,System.String)
member.summary: Maps default endpoints for health, metrics, and API documentation.
member.param: Required service prefix for health and metrics endpoints.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.DatabaseExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for adding database context with PostgreSQL to the application.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.DatabaseExtensions.AddPostgresDbContext``1(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder,System.Action{Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextOptionsBuilder},System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds a PostgreSQL DbContext with resilience and optimized configuration.
member.param: Optional action to configure DbContext options.
The name of the connection string (defaults to TContext name).
Whether to enable dynamic JSON support for storing polymorphic types.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.DatabaseExtensions.MigrateDatabaseAsync``1(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHost,System.Int32)
member.summary: Applies database migrations on application startup. Should be called after building the WebApplication.
member.param: Maximum number of connection retry attempts (default: 20).
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.HttpClientExtensions.AddIAMServiceClient(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: Adds IAM service HTTP client with standard resilience.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.HttpClientExtensions.AddUploadServiceClient(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: Adds Upload service HTTP client with standard resilience.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.HttpClientExtensions.AddPdfServiceClient(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: Adds PDF service HTTP client with standard resilience.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.HttpClientExtensions.AddNotificationServiceClient(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: Adds Notification service HTTP client with standard resilience.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.HttpClientExtensions.AddCustomerServiceClient(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: Adds Customer service HTTP client with standard resilience.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.HttpClientExtensions.AddServiceClient``2(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a typed service HTTP client with standardized Triple Fallback discovery and resilience.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.HttpClientExtensions.AddServiceClient``2(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a typed service HTTP client with standardized Triple Fallback discovery and resilience.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.HttpClientExtensions.AddServiceClient(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder,System.String,System.String,System.Action{System.Net.Http.HttpClient})
member.summary: Adds generic service HTTP client with configurable name and URL.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.HttpClientExtensions.AddServiceClient(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.String,System.String,System.Action{System.Net.Http.HttpClient})
member.summary: Adds generic service HTTP client with configurable name and URL.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IAMRegistrationExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for IAM registration with background retry and health check integration

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IAMRegistrationExtensions.AddIAMRegistration``1(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Adds IAM registration with background retry and health check integration. Registration happens in the background after service startup completes, preventing blocking and enabling graceful degradation if IAM service is unavailable.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.MassTransitExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for adding MassTransit with RabbitMQ to the application.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.MassTransitExtensions.AddMassTransitWithRabbitMq(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder,System.Action{MassTransit.IBusRegistrationConfigurator},System.Action{MassTransit.IBusRegistrationContext,MassTransit.IRabbitMqBusFactoryConfigurator})
member.summary: Adds MassTransit with RabbitMQ configuration. Requires "rabbitmq" or "RabbitMQ" connection string to be configured.
member.param: Optional action to configure MassTransit consumers and settings.
Optional action to configure RabbitMQ bus settings (e.g., custom queues, routing).
member.exception: Thrown when RabbitMQ connection string is not configured.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.MiddlewareExtensions.AddStandardMiddleware(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder,System.Action{Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.MiddlewareOptions})
member.summary: Adds standard middleware services to the application. Call this in Program.cs before building the app.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.MiddlewareExtensions.UseStandardMiddleware(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.IApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: Uses standard middleware in the application pipeline. Call this in Program.cs after app.Build() and before other middleware. Order: CorrelationId → SecurityHeaders → ExceptionHandling → RequestLogging

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.MiddlewareOptions.EnableRequestLogging
member.summary: Enable request/response logging (can be verbose). Default: false

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.MiddlewareOptions.IncludeStackTraceInDevelopment
member.summary: Include stack traces in error responses in development. Default: true

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.MiddlewareOptions.CorrelationIdHeaderName
member.summary: Correlation ID header name. Default: X-Correlation-ID

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.MiddlewareOptions.CustomSecurityHeaders
member.summary: Custom security headers to add/override.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.RateLimitingExtensions.AddStandardRateLimiting(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder,System.Action{Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.RateLimiterOptions})
member.summary: Adds standard rate limiting with configurable options. Uses fixed window rate limiter by default.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.RateLimiterOptions.UseGlobalLimiter
member.summary: Use global rate limiter (applies to all requests). Default: true

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.RateLimiterOptions.PermitLimit
member.summary: Number of requests allowed per window. Default: 100

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.RateLimiterOptions.WindowMinutes
member.summary: Time window in minutes. Default: 1 minute

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.RateLimiterOptions.QueueLimit
member.summary: Maximum queue size for waiting requests. Default: 0 (no queue)

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.RateLimiterOptions.QueueProcessingOrder
member.summary: Queue processing order. Default: OldestFirst

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.RateLimiterOptions.PartitionKeySelector
member.summary: Custom partition key selector. Default: User name or Host header

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.RedisExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for adding Redis distributed cache to the application.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.RedisExtensions.AddRedisDistributedCache(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder,System.String,System.Action{StackExchange.Redis.ConfigurationOptions})
member.summary: Adds Redis distributed cache to the application. Requires "redis" connection string to be configured.
member.param: Optional Redis instance name prefix (defaults to service name).
Optional action to configure Redis options.
member.exception: Thrown when Redis connection string is not configured.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.RedisExtensions.AddRedisConnectionMultiplexer(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder,System.String,System.Action{StackExchange.Redis.ConfigurationOptions})
member.summary: Adds Redis IConnectionMultiplexer to the application. Requires "redis" connection string to be configured.
member.param: Optional action to configure Redis options.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.SecretsExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for loading secrets from various sources.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.SecretsExtensions.AddGoogleSecretManagerVolume(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder,System.String)
member.summary: Loads secrets from Google Secret Manager mounted as a Kubernetes volume. Typically mounted at /mnt/secrets with each secret as a separate file.
member.param: The path where secrets are mounted (default: /mnt/secrets).

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a type. Example: T:Namespace.Outer+Inner`1 becomes T:Namespace.Outer.Inner`1

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.PropertyInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName or for an indexer P:Namespace.ContainingType.Item(System.Int32)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property given its container type and property name. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.MethodInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a method (or constructor). For example: M:Namespace.ContainingType.MethodName(ParamType1,ParamType2)~ReturnType M:Namespace.ContainingType.#ctor(ParamType)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.GetTypeDocId(System.Type,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generates a documentation ID string for a type. This method handles nested types (replacing '+' with '.'), generic types, arrays, pointers, by-ref types, and generic parameters. The flag controls whether constructed generic type arguments are emitted, while controls whether the generic arity marker (e.g. "`1") is appended.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.NormalizeDocId(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes a documentation comment ID to match the compiler-style format. Strips the return type suffix for ordinary methods but retains it for conversion operators.
member.param: The documentation comment ID to normalize.
